parsed.production_notes: The top character is an AI-generated avatar, evident from the unnatural cyborg neck and eye elements, as well as slightly stiff lip-syncing. The bottom character is a human recorded on video in a natural outdoor setting.

characters.appearance: Female, young adult, slim build, fair complexion, dark hair pulled back. She has a robotic, metallic neck and a cyborg-like patch over her left eye.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon traditional Indian outfit with intricate gold embroidery.

characters.appearance: Male, young adult, average build, fair complexion, short dark hair, clean-shaven. His facial features are soft and approachable.

scenes.setting: Split screen. Top: indoor, beige sofa. Bottom: outdoor, stone wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits centered on a beige sofa against a plain white wall. She faces directly forward, maintaining eye contact with the camera. Her posture is upright and composed. The lighting is soft, even, and bright, illuminating her features clearly. The background is minimal and uncluttered, drawing focus entirely to her.

Character B stands outdoors, centered in the frame. Behind him is a wall made of large, rectangular, light brown stone blocks with a textured surface. He faces the camera directly. The natural daylight casts soft shadows on his face and shirt. His expression is engaged as he speaks.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout divides the video horizontally. The top half features an AI-generated female avatar sitting indoors, while the bottom half shows a human male standing outdoors. Large text overlays appear in the center of the screen, displaying the spoken dialogue in Hinglish and English. A persistent red banner at the top reads 'Office main kaam aane wali English'. The two characters appear to be having a back-and-forth conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: सर, मैं आज छुट्टी लेना चाहता हूँ। [Sir, I want to take a leave today.]
Character A says: Sir, I'd like to take a leave today.
Character B says: मुझे एक पर्सनल काम है। [I have a personal matter to attend to.]
Character A says: I have a personal matter to attend to.
Character B says: मैं अपना काम पहले कम्पलीट कर दूंगा। [I will complete my work beforehand.]
Character A says: I will complete my work beforehand.
Character B says: अगर ज़रूरत पड़ी, तो फ़ोन पे अवेलेबल रहूँगा। [If needed, I will be available on the phone.]
Character A says: I will be available on phone if needed.
Character B says: सर आपसे परमिशन चाहिए। [Sir, I need your permission.]
Character A says: I'm seeking your permission.
Character B says: अरे ये तो बहुत आसान है। [Oh, this is very easy.]
Character A says: हाँ, इंग्लिश सीखना आसान ही है। बस तुम्हें ऐसे प्रैक्टिस करते रहना और दो हफ्ते में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्स्ट क्लास हो जाएगी। [Yes, learning English is easy. Just keep practicing like this and in two weeks your English will be first class.]
Character B says: ये मैं कहाँ कर सकता हूँ? [Where can I do this?]
scenes.on_screen_text: Office main kaam aane wali English. lena chahutu. a leave today. Mujhe ek personal. I have a personal. matter to attend. Main apna kaam. pehle complete. I will complete. my work beforehand. Agar zarurdh. pe available. I will be available. aapse permission. permission. aasaan hai. English seekhna. rehna aur do hafte. me tumhari English. first class ho. kar sakta hoon.

scenes.setting: Split screen. Top: smartphone mockup. Bottom: outdoor, stone wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A black smartphone is positioned vertically in the center of the frame. The background behind the phone consists of a beige sofa and a plain white wall, slightly out of focus. The phone's screen is blank. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the sleek edges of the device. The composition is simple, focusing entirely on the phone against the soft background.

Character B stands outdoors, centered in the frame. Behind him is a wall made of large, rectangular, light brown stone blocks with a textured surface. He faces the camera directly. The natural daylight casts soft shadows on his face and shirt. His expression is neutral and attentive.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues, but the top half now displays a screencast of a mobile application on a smartphone. The app interface shows various learning modules and a simulated video call screen. The bottom half remains a static video of the human male standing outdoors. The red banner at the top persists throughout the scene. The overall composition shifts from a two-person conversation to an app demonstration.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: तुम्हें बस स्पीकएक्स ऐप डाउनलोड करना है। [You just have to download the SpeakX app.]
Character A says: इसमें मेरे जैसे एआई इंग्लिश टीचर तुम्हें बिना जजमेंट के इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कराएंगे। [In this, AI English teachers like me will make you practice English without judgment.]
Character A says: और तुम्हारी इंग्लिश फर्राटेदार हो जाएगी। [And your English will become fluent.]
Character A says: जल्दी स्पीकएक्स डाउनलोड करो और दो हफ्ते में अपनी इंग्लिश से सबको इम्प्रेस करो। [Quickly download SpeakX and impress everyone with your English in two weeks.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Office main kaam aane wali English. Talk About ANYTHING. Available 24x7 | Anytime Anywhere. TALK NOW. Job Interview. MOST VIEWED. 8 Mins. Easy. Introduce yourself. TRENDING NOW. 6 Mins. Medium. Describe your education. Home. Membership. AI Call. Profile. Speak with AI TEACHER. TALK ABOUT ANYTHING | AVAILABLE 24*7. Talk Now. Schedule a call. Connecting... Ongoing call. 00:00. You're on the call! Let's start from where we paused. Tap the hint anytime you need. 00:01.
